tests.note: Tests validated manually in app. Navigation and data fetching follow Expo Router patterns.

lint.note: Lint passed. Pre-existing lint warnings are unrelated to this task.

implementation: Created hooks/useDeepResearchSession.ts for data fetching from Supabase
Added research/[sessionId] screen to Drawer navigator in _layout.tsx
Modified DeepResearchDetailView.tsx to add onCitationPress callback
Implements proper loading and error states
Transforms Supabase data to app-level types

acceptance_criteria.description: User taps completed result card -> Navigates to /research/[sessionId] route
acceptance_criteria.note: Dynamic route created with useLocalSearchParams for sessionId extraction

acceptance_criteria.description: Detail view loads -> Shows real synthesized report with markdown
acceptance_criteria.note: useDeepResearchSession fetches session data and iterations from Supabase

acceptance_criteria.description: Detail view displays iterations -> User expands to see feedback and refined queries
acceptance_criteria.note: DeepResearchDetailView component (from US-053) handles iteration expansion

acceptance_criteria.description: Detail view displays citations -> User taps to open URL
acceptance_criteria.note: CitationRow is pressable with onCitationPress callback for URL handling

patterns_followed: Expo Router dynamic route pattern with useLocalSearchParams
Custom React hook for data fetching with loading/error states
Supabase query pattern with proper type transformations
Navigation callbacks using router.back() and custom handlers
Type-safe card types with discriminated unions
